footer.taglineSuffix: manage academics, finance, staff, and parent communication from one platform.

home.heroBadge: Built in Nairobi for Kenyan schools
home.heroSubtitle: A one-stop solution to manage, track, and automate your entire school - from CBC grading to fee collection.
home.heroSubtitleExtra: Real-time dashboards designed for Kenyan schools, with M-Pesa-ready payments.
home.rolesSectionSubtitle: Tailored experiences for every stakeholder, ensuring engagement and efficiency across the board.
home.modulesSectionSubtitle: A comprehensive toolkit aligned with Kenya's CBC curriculum and the way schools run day to day.
home.finalCtaSubtitle: Join schools across Kenya that are digitizing admissions, fees, and parent communication with {productName}.
home.adminTitle: Run your entire school from one place
home.adminDescription: Get a comprehensive overview of your school - finances, attendance, student performance, and staff - all in one dashboard.
home.adminFeature1: Manage students, classes, admissions, and staff from a single academic dashboard
home.adminFeature2: Track fees, invoices, payments, and payroll with built-in financial reports
home.adminFeature3: Launch branded school websites with online admissions and role-based access
home.teacherTitle: Spend less time on admin, more on teaching
home.teacherDescription: Take attendance, enter grades, create assignments, and generate report cards - all from your dashboard.
home.teacherFeature1: Take daily attendance and enter grades in a class gradebook
home.teacherFeature2: Create assignments with file uploads, run exams, and print report cards
home.teacherFeature3: Message students and parents directly from your teacher dashboard
home.parentDescription: Parents track grades, fees, timetables, and assignments in real time. Students submit work from any device.
home.parentFeature1: View grades, attendance, timetables, and school events in real time
home.parentFeature2: Pay fees instantly via M-Pesa or smart payment links with the exact amount pre-filled
home.parentFeature3: Submit assignments, browse the library, and message teachers from any device

features.title: Features
features.subtitle: Everything you need to run a modern school

getAccess.heroSubtitle: No setup fees. No long contracts. A complete digital ecosystem for your school, built in Kenya for CBC schools, academies, and international programmes.
getAccess.mobilePreviewAlt: {productName} mobile app preview — academics, M-Pesa payments, and parent communication
getAccess.journeySubtitle: Simple, guided steps to get your school online.
getAccess.step1Desc: Create your school account with your name and admin email. Takes 60 seconds.
getAccess.step2Desc: A guided 4-step wizard walks you through domain, colors, and your public site template.
getAccess.step3Desc: Add teachers, finance officers, and other admins — each gets a role-specific dashboard.
getAccess.step4Desc: Your school portal and public website are ready. Parents and students can start using it today.
getAccess.includedSubtitle: One platform, all the tools your school needs from day one.
getAccess.included5: School public website with online admissions
